wordplay_note: Shining wisdom — she is the Shekinah (divine feminine presence)
card_description: Zina Pallas (meaning "Zina = shining; Pallas = Pallas Athena (wisdom)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Schoolgirl who is the incarnation of Holy Wisdom helping Emmanuel reclaim Earth. Name note: Shining wisdom — she is the Shekinah (divine feminine presence). The divine feminine as PKD's persistent agent of salvation. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Schoolgirl who is the incarnation of Holy Wisdom helping Emmanuel reclaim Earth
reference.significance: The divine feminine as PKD's persistent agent of salvation
